title: Auto Walk
description: Toggle auto-walk with a keybind to move forward continuously without holding keys.
body:
## MOD ABANDONED!!

# Auto Walk

A feature-rich client-side mod that adds automatic walking functionality with safety features to Minecraft. Walk hands-free with intelligent obstacle detection and customizable danger avoidance.

## Features

### Auto-Walk
- **Toggle Auto-Walk**: Press a keybind (default: R) to start walking forward automatically
- **Hands-Free Movement**: Walk continuously in any direction you're facing
- **Smart Auto-Jump**: Automatically jumps over obstacles (optional, configurable)
- **Visual & Audio Feedback**: On-screen messages and sound effects when toggling

### SafeWalk System
- **Automatic Safety Stops**: Prevents walking into dangerous situations
- **Cliff Detection**: Stops before ledges and drops (configurable height threshold)
- **Danger Avoidance**: Automatically stops when approaching:
  - Water and lava
  - Fire and campfires
  - Magma blocks
  - Sweet berry bushes
- **Separate Toggle**: Enable/disable SafeWalk independently (unbound by default)
- **Warning Alerts**: Clear notifications when stopped for safety

### Configuration
- **In-Game Settings**: Full configuration menu via Mod Menu and Cloth Config
- **Customizable Safety**: Toggle individual danger types on/off
- **Adjustable Drop Height**: Set minimum cliff height to avoid (1-20 blocks)
- **Persistent Settings**: All preferences saved automatically

## How to Use

**Basic Auto-Walk:**
1. Look in the direction you want to walk
2. Press **R** to enable auto-walk
3. Your character will move forward automatically
4. Press **R** again to stop

**SafeWalk (Optional):**
1. Bind the SafeWalk toggle in Controls (unbound by default)
2. Enable SafeWalk when you want automatic danger detection
3. Auto-walk will stop automatically when approaching hazards

**Configuration:**
- Install Mod Menu and Cloth Config for in-game settings
- Access via Mods menu → Auto Walk → Configure
- Customize all safety and movement options
